info.name: Unity Sentis (ONNX + C# DSP bundle)
info.description: Builds a Unity Sentis bundle: ONNX model plus matching C# DSP scripts (Spectral Analysis, MFE, MFCC). Drop into any Unity 6 project — Quest 2/3, mobile XR, desktop.

parameters.name: Quantization
parameters.help: Which TFLite variant to convert. float32 matches Sentis's default precision.
